title: helianthemum variabile var. linearifolium
intro: Helianthemum variabile var. linearifolium, also known as rockrose or sunrose, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the Cistaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum variabile var. linearifolium include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in topical applications to treat skin conditions and promote tissue repair.
